Meaning.En: A network security system that monitors and controls incoming and outgoing network traffic based on predetermined security rules.
Meaning.Example: Company policy requires all servers to be protected by a properly configured firewall.

Situation.Vi: Một hệ thống phần mềm hoặc phần cứng ngăn chặn truy cập trái phép vào mạng nội bộ.
Situation.En: A software or hardware system that blocks unauthorized access to a private network.

Situation.Vi: Trong quản trị mạng, firewall được đặt giữa mạng nội bộ và Internet để lọc lưu lượng.
Situation.En: In network administration, the firewall is placed between the internal network and the Internet to filter traffic.

Meaning.En: A fire-resistant wall designed to prevent the spread of fire between sections of a building.
Meaning.Example: The building code mandates firewalls between adjacent residential units.

Situation.Vi: Tường bê tông dày được xây giữa các căn hộ để ngăn lửa lan khi xảy ra cháy.
Situation.En: A thick concrete wall built between apartments to prevent fire from spreading during a fire.
